footer.tagline: Full-Stack Developer & UI Engineer building at the intersection of code and design.

hero.heading: Crafting digital experiences that leave a mark.
hero.body: Hi, I'm Alex Rivera — a Full-Stack Developer & UI Engineer who turns complex problems into elegant, high-performance products. I build at the intersection of code and design, where every pixel and every function matters.
hero.sub: Designer & developer crafting digital experiences that matter.

featuredProjects.heading: Selected Work
featuredProjects.body: A curated look at projects I'm proud of — from zero-to-launch products to design systems built for scale.

skills.heading: What I Bring to the Table
skills.body: Years of shipping real products have sharpened a toolkit that spans the full stack — from pixel-perfect interfaces to resilient backend architecture.

ctaBanner.heading: Let's build something remarkable together.
ctaBanner.body: Whether you have a product idea, a team that needs a senior engineer, or a design that needs to come alive — I'm open to the right opportunity.

about.introBody: Full-Stack Developer. UI Engineer. Occasional design nerd. Based in San Francisco, working globally.
about.bioParagraph1: I've spent the last eight years building software that people actually enjoy using. My career started in agency work, where tight deadlines and demanding clients taught me to move fast without cutting corners. From there I moved into product — joining early-stage startups as the first or second engineer, owning everything from database schema to deployment pipelines to the design of the onboarding flow.
about.bioParagraph2: I care deeply about the craft. I believe that great software is invisible — it just works, it feels right, and it gets out of the user's way. That philosophy shapes every decision I make, from component architecture to copy on a button.
about.bioParagraph3: When I'm not in the editor, I'm hiking trails in Marin, obsessing over specialty coffee, or contributing to open-source projects that make other developers' lives a little easier.
about.techBody: The tools I reach for first — and know deeply enough to bend when needed.
about.role1Desc: Lead engineer on a B2B SaaS platform serving 40,000+ users. Rebuilt the core dashboard in Next.js 14, reducing load time by 62%. Mentored a team of four junior engineers.
about.role2Desc: First engineering hire at a Series A startup. Architected the entire frontend from scratch, integrated Stripe billing, and helped grow the product from 0 to 12,000 paying customers.
about.role3Desc: Delivered 30+ client projects across e-commerce, media, and fintech verticals. Specialised in performance optimisation and accessibility compliance.
about.role4Desc: Graduated with a focus on systems programming and human-computer interaction.
about.bio1: Full-stack designer and developer crafting digital experiences that blend aesthetics with functionality.
about.bio2: Passionate about clean code, intuitive interfaces, and solving complex problems through thoughtful design.
about.bio3: When I'm not designing, you'll find me exploring new tools, contributing to open source, or sharing knowledge with the community.
about.connectHeadline: Ready to bring your vision to life?
about.connectSubtext: I'm always interested in hearing about new projects and opportunities.
about.headline: Designer & Developer
about.introText: I create beautiful, functional digital experiences. Specializing in web design, UI/UX, and full-stack development.

projects.pageSubtitle: Every project here was built with intention — real problems, real constraints, real users. Filter by discipline or scroll through the full archive.
projects.ctaBody: I take on a limited number of freelance and contract engagements each quarter. If your timeline and scope are a good fit, let's talk.
projects.project1Desc: A complete rebuild of a B2B analytics dashboard in Next.js 14 with server components, real-time data via WebSockets, and a custom Radix UI design system. Load time cut by 62%.
projects.project2Desc: End-to-end Stripe integration with subscription management, usage-based billing, and a self-serve customer portal. Processed $2M+ in transactions in year one.
projects.project3Desc: An open-source component library built on Radix UI primitives with full dark-mode support, Storybook documentation, and automated visual regression testing.
projects.project4Desc: A progressive web app for hikers to log routes, track elevation, and share trips. Offline-first with IndexedDB sync and a Mapbox GL integration.
projects.project5Desc: A lightweight REST API monitoring tool that pings endpoints on a schedule, logs response times, and sends Slack/email alerts on failure. 1,200+ GitHub stars.
projects.project6Desc: A headless CMS built for creative agencies — structured content, live preview, and a drag-and-drop page builder. Replaced a $800/mo Contentful plan for three agency clients.

contact.pageSubtitle: I read every message personally. Whether it's a full-time role, a freelance project, or just a question — drop me a line and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.placeholderSubject: e.g. Freelance project, Job opportunity, Collaboration
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell me about your project, timeline, and budget — the more detail, the better.
contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within one to two business days.
contact.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.socialBody: Prefer a different channel? Reach out directly — I'm active on all of these.
contact.availabilityBody: I'm open to senior full-stack roles, contract engagements, and select freelance projects starting Q3 2025. If the work is meaningful and the team is strong, I want to hear about it.
contact.availabilityDesc: I typically reply to inquiries the next business day.

faq.a1: I work with startups, agencies, and established brands on web design, app development, and digital strategy projects.
faq.a2: Project timelines vary, but most engagements start with a discovery phase. I'll provide a detailed estimate after our initial conversation.
faq.a3: Yes, I'm open to both full-time roles and freelance projects. Let's discuss what works best for you.
